faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Sheepshead Bay?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Sheepshead Bay typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of the colony, location of the hive, and accessibility. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Sheepshead Bay property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Sheepshead Bay and surrounding Brooklyn areas. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an inspection at your convenience and can typically complete removal within 24-48 hours of assessment, depending on the complexity of the situation.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane relocation of honey bee colonies to local beekeepers and sanctuaries. For aggressive species or situations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted, environmentally responsible methods to ensure your safety while minimizing environmental impact.

faqs.question: What types of bees are common in Sheepshead Bay?
faqs.answer: Sheepshead Bay residents commonly encounter honey bees, carpenter bees, and bumblebees. Carpenter bees are particularly prevalent in older wooden structures near the waterfront, while honey bee swarms often appear in spring. Our technicians are experienced with all local species and provide customized removal solutions for each situation.
